channel.title: Education on Picnic Spoons
channel.description: Recent content in Education on Picnic Spoons

item.title: Book of Centuries
item.description: A reflection on historical memory, timelines, and the strange experience of placing lives, events, and ideas beside one another across centuries.

item.title: Education as Atmosphere
item.description: On creating the type of environment necessary for the learner to thrive: the ambiance for deep thought, and the atmosphere for creativity and synthesis.

item.title: What Gets Passed Down
item.description: Notes on inheritance beyond genetics: books, habits, songs, recipes, stories, educational values, emotional patterns, and ways of seeing the world.
